cmd.app_tour_done: Na-amalite njem nleta — jiri Ọzọ gafee ya.
cmd.app_tour_hint: Njem nduzi nke njirimara ndị bụ isi
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Kwenye na mkparịta ụka iji hichapụ azịza gị.
cmd.clear_my_answers_hint: Tọgharịa azịza gị na ọrụ a
cmd.clear_workspace: Hichapụ ihe niile ma malite ọhụrụ
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Na-ewepụ ọdịnaya na akụkọ ihe mere eme ugbu a — na-ajụ tupu
cmd.create_lesson: Mepụta ihe mmụta (gwa m isiokwu ahụ)
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Na-amalite usoro nduzi ihe mmụta — AlloBot ga-ajụ gị isiokwu gị.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Na-amalite usoro nduzi — kwuo isiokwu na klaasị
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Gbanwee n'usoro: ọkụ, sepia, gbara ọchịchịrị, enyemaka dyslexia, na ndị ọzọ
cmd.export_pack_hint: Budata ihe mmụta dị ka faịlụ jụụ kwụ onwe ya
cmd.font_bigger_done: E mere ka nha ederede buru ibu ruo
cmd.font_reset_done: Atọgharịala nha ederede ka ọ laghachi na ndabara.
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Mee nyocha isi mmalite n'ọdịnaya ugbu a
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Mepụta nkọwa okwu site n'ọdịnaya ugbu a
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Mepụta nchịkọta site n'ọdịnaya ugbu a
cmd.generate_quiz: Mepụta ajụjụ site na nke a
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Mepụta ajụjụ site n'ọdịnaya ugbu a
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_hint: Mepụta etiti ahịrịokwu site n'ọdịnaya ugbu a
cmd.generate_simplified: Mee ka ederede a dị mfe
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Mepụta ọkwa ọgụgụ dị mfe — kwuo “ruo klaasị N” maka ebumnuche
cmd.go_dashboard_hint: Laghachi n'echiche ihe mmụta bụ isi
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Mụọ nkọwa okwu a dị ka uka flashcard
cmd.open_allohaven_hint: Ebe dị jụụ, na-eme ka ahụ dajụọ
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Malite ma ọ bụ sonye n'oge klaasị dị ndụ
cmd.open_community_catalog_hint: Chọgharịa ihe mmụta obodo e kekọrịtara
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Wuo ma bupụ akwụkwọ dị iche iche
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Emepela Ebe Nzukọ Onye Nkuzi — kaadị Document Pipeline dị nso n'elu.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Ngwaọrụ ihe mmụta + kaadị Document Pipeline
cmd.open_lumen_hint: Gbanwee data nyocha ka ọ bụrụ eserese
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Jụọ persona AI ajụjụ gbasara isiokwu a
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: AI maka ọrụ ọ bụla, idekọ olu, na nchịkwa Socratic
cmd.open_sel_hub_hint: Ngwaọrụ mmụta mmekọrịta na mmetụta uche
cmd.open_storyforge_hint: Ide ihe na-akpalite uche site na nduzi
cmd.open_study_timer_hint: Ngụ oge maka itinye uche / izu ike
cmd.open_wizard_hint: Imepụta ihe mmụta nzọụkwụ na nzọụkwụ
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Akụkụ Mbudata — PDF e tagụrụ bụ mbiputa dị njikere maka ịkekọrịta.
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Mmezigharị ọzọ iji mee ka akara dịkwuo elu
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: Akụkụ ahụ adịghị na ihuenyo ugbu a.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Ahichapụla — bulite akwụkwọ ọhụrụ iji malite.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Hichapụ nsonaazụ a ma bulite faịlụ ọhụrụ
cmd.pipeline_score: Gịnị bụ akara inweta ohere m?
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Na-akpọ tupu ugbu a → mgbe ahụ
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Kwụsị mgbe usoro a gụchara — na-edobe ihe e mechara
cmd.pipeline_tour: Gosi m gburugburu nsonaazụ ndị a
cmd.pipeline_tour_hint: Njem nleta sekọnd 60 nke nsonaazụ mmezigharị
cmd.read_this_page_done: Emepela onye na-agụ ibe — họrọ ebe ị ga-amalite.
cmd.set_font_size_hint: dịka “tọọ nha ederede ka ọ bụrụ 20” (10–32)
cmd.submit_work_hint: Zigara onye nkuzi gị ọrụ gị
cmd.switch_theme: Gbanwee isiokwu (ọkụ / gbara ọchịchịrị / nnukwu ọdịiche)
cmd.switch_theme_done: Agbanweela isiokwu — na-agba n'usoro ọkụ, mgbe ahụ gbara ọchịchịrị, mgbe ahụ nnukwu ọdịiche.
cmd.switch_theme_hint: Gbanwee n'usoro ọkụ → gbara ọchịchịrị → nnukwu ọdịiche
cmd.toggle_bot: Gosi ma ọ bụ zoo AlloBot
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync: Gbanye ma ọ bụ gbanyụọ mmekọrịta igwe ojii
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Na-emepe mkparịta ụka nkwenye mmekọrịta igwe ojii — kwenye ebe ahụ iji gbanye ya.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Mekọrịta ọrụ gị na igwe ojii (na-ajụ nkwenye na mbụ)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Gbanwee n'usoro agba dị nro n'elu ibe
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_hint: Mee ka ihe niile gbaa ọchịchịrị ma e wezụga ọdịnaya
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Agbanweela ụdị enyemaka — pịa njikwa ọ bụla iji mụta gbasara ya.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Pịa ihe ọ bụla iji mụta ihe ọ na-eme
cmd.toggle_line_focus_hint: Mee ka otu ahịrị pụta ìhè n'otu oge
cmd.toggle_mute: Mechie ma ọ bụ kwụghachi ụda niile
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Nduzi ahịrị na-emegharị emegharị maka iso ụzọ
cmd.toggle_socratic_hint: Onye enyi mmụta na-ebu ajụjụ ụzọ
cmd.translate_document_done: Tọọ asụsụ nsụgharị ka ọ bụrụ
cmd.translate_document_done2: ma kpata ọkụ na bọtịnụ — pịa Sụgharịa iji mee ya. (Nsụgharị na-eji oke AI, ya mere ịpị ya bụ nke gị.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Na-edebe asụsụ tupu ma na-atụ aka na bọtịnụ
cmd.translate_document_pick: Akpasịala ihe njikwa nsụgharị — họrọ asụsụ ma pịa Sụgharịa.
cmd.undo_settings_done: Eweghachila ntọala gị gara aga (ọ bụrụ na e nwere mgbanwe a ga-atọgharị).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Weghachi ntọala ihe mmụta gara aga (ọ bụghị ọdịnaya emepụtara)
cmd.voice_start_done: Njikwa olu agbanyela. Kwuo iwu dịka “ederede buru ibu” ma ọ bụ “mepee ebe nzukọ onye nkuzi”. Kwuo “kwụsị ige ntị” iji kwụsị.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot na-ege ntị maka iwu ruo mgbe ị kwụsịrị ya
cmd.voice_stop_done: Njikwa olu agbanyụọla — ahapụla igwe okwu.
cmd.zen_on_done: Ụdị zen agbanyela — pịa Ctrl+K ma mee “pụọ zen” iji laghachi.
cmd.zen_on_hint: Zoo ihe niile ma e wezụga ọdịnaya
palette.footer: A na-ekwupụta omume ọ bụla. Ctrl+K na-agbanwe ya.
palette.no_match: Ọ dịghị iwu dabara adaba. Mkparịta ụka bot (na n'oge na-adịghị anya, olu) na-aghọta arịrịọ enweghị usoro.
palette.placeholder: Pịnye iwu — “ederede buru ibu”, “educator hub”, “gụọ ibe a”…
